parameters.jsCode:
const src = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: {
  'Timestamp': new Date().toISOString(),
  'Job No.': src.job_id || '',
  'Status': 'init',
  'Job Type': src.job_type || '',
  'Priority': src.priority || '',
  'Scheduled Date': src.appoint_date || '',
  'Shop Name': src.customer_name || '',
  'Customer ID': src.customer_id || '',
  'C.LINE User ID': src.customer_line_id || '',
  'Customer Type': '',
  'Google Maps URL': src.job_maps_url || '',
  'Location': '',
  'Shop GPS Lat': 0,
  'Shop GPS Lng': 0,
  'Assigned Technician': '',
  'Staff ID': src.staff_id || '',
  'Tech Name': src.tech_name || '',
  'Tech Line ID': src.tech_line_id || '',
  'Tech Lark ID': '',
  'Tech GPS Lat': 0,
  'Tech GPS Lng': 0,
  'Accuracy': 0,
  'Is First': true,
  'Battery Level (%)': '',
  'Interval (min)': '',
  'Notes': src.note || '',
  'Parent items 1': '',
  'Parent items 2': '',
  'Parent items 3': '',
  'Parent items 4': ''
}}];

const src = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: {
  'Timestamp': new Date().toISOString(),
  'Job No.': src.job_id || '',
  'Status': src.status || 'traveling',
  'Job Type': '',
  'Priority': '',
  'Scheduled Date': '',
  'Shop Name': src.customer_name || '',
  'Customer ID': '',
  'C.LINE User ID': src.customer_line_id || '',
  'Customer Type': '',
  'Google Maps URL': '',
  'Location': (src.lat || 0) + ',' + (src.lng || 0),
  'Shop GPS Lat': src.shop_lat || 0,
  'Shop GPS Lng': src.shop_lng || 0,
  'Assigned Technician': '',
  'Staff ID': '',
  'Tech Name': src.tech_name || '',
  'Tech Line ID': '',
  'Tech Lark ID': '',
  'Tech GPS Lat': src.lat || 0,
  'Tech GPS Lng': src.lng || 0,
  'Accuracy': src.accuracy || 0,
  'Is First': src.is_first || false,
  'Battery Level (%)': src.battery || '',
  'Interval (min)': 5,
  'Notes': '',
  'Parent items 1': '',
  'Parent items 2': '',
  'Parent items 3': '',
  'Parent items 4': ''
}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ recipient: '66' + ($('Parse T5 [Arrived]').first().json.customer_phone || '').replace(/^0/, ''), sender_name: 'SK-ICE', message: 'SK ICE: ช่าง' + $('Parse T5 [Arrived]').first().json.tech_name + ' ถึงร้าน' + $('Parse T5 [Arrived]').first().json.customer_name + 'แล้วครับ' }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const jobId = $('Extract Job ID').first().json.job_id;
return [{ json: { job_id: jobId } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={ JSON.stringify({ recipient: '66' + ($('Parse T5 [Update]').first().json.customer_phone || '').replace(/^0/, ''), sender_name: 'SK-ICE', message: 'SK ICE: ช่าง' + $('Parse T5 [Update]').first().json.tech_name + ' กำลังเดินทางมาหาคุณแล้วครับ' }) }
